---
title: "**Presentation of the recent publication on PINNs**"
description: "Invited speaker at the CERN Lattice seminar"
author: "Simone Romiti"
date: "2025-04-03"
categories: [workshop, presentation]
# image: "/files/images/placeholder2.JPG"
page-layout: full
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---

# Information about my talk

In the week 8-13 March 2026 I stayed at CERN as a visitor. The reason of my stay was that I was **invited** as a **speaker** for the [CERN Lattice seminar](https://indico.cern.ch/category/376/).

In [my talk](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1641317/), I presented the novel algorithm and the results discussed in my [recent publication](https://inspirehep.net/literature/3075565): _"SU(N) lattice gauge theories with Physics-Informed Neural Networks"_. 



[![CERN Logo](https://indico.cern.ch/static/custom/files/cern_small.svg){width=50%}](https://indico.cern.ch/category/376/)

<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
